<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Http\Client\Common\Plugin; use Http\Client\Common\Plugin; use Symfony\Component\OptionsResolver\OptionsResolver; /** * @internal */ abstract class SeekableBodyPlugin implements Plugin { /** * @var bool */ protected $useFileBuffer; /** * @var int */ protected $memoryBufferSize; /** * @param array{'use_file_buffer'?: bool, 'memory_boffer_size'?: int} $config * * Configuration options: * - use_file_buffer: Whether this plugin should use a file as a buffer if the stream is too big, defaults to true * - memory_buffer_size: Max memory size in bytes to use for the buffer before it use a file, defaults to 2097152 (2 mb) */ public function __construct(array $config = []) { $resolver = new OptionsResolver(); $resolver->setDefaults([ 'use_file_buffer' => true, 'memory_buffer_size' => 2097152, ]); $resolver->setAllowedTypes('use_file_buffer', 'bool'); $resolver->setAllowedTypes('memory_buffer_size', 'int'); $options = $resolver->resolve($config); $this->useFileBuffer = $options['use_file_buffer']; $this->memoryBufferSize = $options['memory_buffer_size']; } }
